utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. Now check each in the final plan: 1) health_coverage: Provided and split into physical and mental with providers, policy numbers, monthly costs, and coverage details — fully specified. 2) property_coverage: Provided as home_contents with provider, policy number, monthly cost, coverage details — fully specified for home/contents. 3) travel_coverage: Provided as adventure_travel with provider, policy number, monthly cost, coverage details — fully specified. 4) additional_services: Listed items but missing costs; the format requires 'any enhancement services with costs'. Costs are not specified, so this is not fully specified. 5) total_budget: Includes monthly and annual cost breakdown and extra details — fully specified. Therefore, 4 out of 5 items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists specific providers: LifeFirst Standard Plan (physical health), HealthFirst Standard Plan (mental health), HomeFirst Standard Coverage (home contents), and TravelFirst Standard Plan (adventure travel). I matched each of these names to the corresponding entries in the ground-truth ratings and extracted their exact rating numbers.
